messages.content: What is 37 * 43? Show only the final number.

tests.name: JSON
tests.desc: Structured extraction — all fields must be present and correct

messages.content: Extract these facts as JSON only, no explanation: {"element", "symbol", "atomic_number", "state_at_room_temp", "group"}
Gold is a chemical element with the symbol Au and atomic number 79. It is a solid at room temperature and belongs to group 11 of the periodic table.

tests.name: Code
tests.desc: Function generation — must have correct structure and logic

messages.content: Write a Python function called celsius_to_fahrenheit that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit using the formula F = C * 9/5 + 32. Include a docstring. Show a test: celsius_to_fahrenheit(100) should return 212.

tests.name: Reasoning
tests.desc: Multi-step math — verifiable intermediate and final answers

messages.content: A rectangle has length 15 cm and width 8 cm. Calculate: 1) The area. 2) The perimeter. 3) The length of the diagonal (round to 2 decimal places). Show each step.

tests.name: Stress
tests.desc: Large prompt (~3000 tokens) — tests context limit without crash
